ui.alliance_details: Joining a faction unlocks specialized reflection classes (e.g. Holy Aegis, Death Herald) dependent on your core Momentum.
ui.chronology_desc: The immutable history of your choices made across the 100 floors of the tower.
ui.chronology_empty: Your Chronology registry is empty. Begin climbing.
ui.ascend_victory_desc: The Tower is fully conquered! You climbed all 100 floors and were crowned Sovereign of the Cosmos. The timeline belongs to your faction.
ui.outer_haven_desc: Beyond the tower gates. Trade items, Rest to replenish HP, or Scout dangers for extra gold.
ui.rest_desc: Restore all HP to full vitality. Costs 50 Gold.
ui.scout_desc: Earn gold tokens by clearing local blight. Risk of taking HP decay.
ui.skill_acid_spray_desc: Sprays acid dealing damage and inflicting Poison
ui.skill_toxic_slam_desc: Slams down dealing massive damage and Poison
ui.skill_plague_bite_desc: Bites with plagued fangs dealing damage and Poison
ui.item_adventurers_ring_desc: A simple ring granting extra Will.
ui.floor_1_desc: Your climb begins at the root. The atmosphere is damp, thick with blight spores and the skittering of infected creatures.
ui.floor_1_intro_desc: You stand before the massive iron seal of Floor 1. Cold mist swirls as the wind from the tower corridors whispers secrets.
ui.floor_1_intro_optA_text: Pledge your blade to the Spires (+Aether, +Order)
ui.floor_1_intro_optA_journal: Pledged alignment to the Sanctum at the base gateway.
ui.floor_1_intro_optB_text: Absorb the mold to harden your willpower (+Aether, +Void)
ui.floor_1_intro_optB_journal: Absorbed decay energy to strengthen the dark soul.
ui.floor_1_intro_optC_text: Loot fallen scouts for equipment tokens (+Gold)
ui.floor_1_intro_optC_journal: Prioritized survival equipment tokens over spiritual alignments.
ui.floor_1_node_0_desc: Golden light leaks from broken wall cracks. You feel the pulse of the Core.
ui.floor_1_node_0_optA_text: Recite a short purification mantra (+10 EXP)
ui.floor_1_node_0_optA_journal: Began the climb on Floor 1 with focus and cleansing rituals.
ui.floor_1_node_0_optB_text: Smash decorative statues for gold scraps (+20 Gold)
ui.floor_1_node_0_optB_journal: Smashed temple icons for quick currency values.
ui.floor_1_node_1_desc: A mutant rodent swathed in purple rot blocks the hallway.
ui.floor_1_node_2_desc: An old iron box covered in blight moss.
ui.floor_1_node_2_optA_journal: Discovered an Adventurer's Ring in Flatlands cache on Floor 1.
ui.floor_1_node_2_optB_text: Pry it open using gold picks (-15 Gold, +Scout Dagger)
ui.floor_1_node_2_optB_journal: Acquired a Scout Dagger by picking locks.
ui.floor_1_node_3_desc: Warm warmth emanates from a brick fireplace glowing with holy flame.
ui.floor_1_node_3_optA_journal: Healed deep wounds at the Wild Hearth on Floor 1.
ui.floor_1_node_3_optB_text: Sacrifice blood to receive power (-10 HP, +15 Aether)
ui.floor_1_node_3_optB_journal: Shed blood for the Sanctum's warm light on Floor 1.
ui.floor_1_node_4_desc: A many-legged insect coated in acid armor waits in the darkness.
ui.floor_1_node_5_desc: Eerie runes glow on a cracked pillar. A quiet voice promises power in exchange for your faith.
ui.floor_1_node_5_optA_text: Reject the voice and cleanse the stone (+10 Alignment, +20 EXP)
ui.floor_1_node_5_optA_journal: Purified a whispering chaotic wall, aligning further with Spires Order.
ui.floor_1_node_5_optB_journal: Whispered secrets back to the dark wall, feeding the void soul.
ui.floor_1_node_6_desc: A hunched goblin-like figure with a dynamic trading cart filled with metal scraps.
ui.floor_1_node_6_optA_text: Buy Scout Boots (-35 Gold, +Scout Leather Boots)
ui.floor_1_node_6_optA_journal: Purchased Scout Leather Boots from the shabby scavenger on Floor 1.
ui.floor_1_node_6_optB_journal: Traded junk metal parts for solid coins.
ui.floor_1_node_6_optC_journal: Walked past the scavenger merchant without buying.
ui.floor_1_node_7_desc: A parasitic fungus animation driving a dead skeleton forward.
ui.floor_1_node_8_desc: A locked wooden crate smelling of old pine and sulfur.
ui.floor_1_node_8_optA_journal: Forced a crate lock open, getting minor splinter damage but discovering gold.
ui.floor_1_node_8_optB_text: Leave it untouched for safety (+10 EXP)
ui.floor_1_node_8_optB_journal: Exercised caution by ignoring the suspicious locked crate.
ui.floor_1_node_9_desc: A moonstone basin filled with glowing dark blue waters.
ui.floor_1_node_9_optA_journal: Drank moon water on Floor 1, closing all wounds at small spiritual cost.
ui.floor_1_node_9_optB_journal: Sacrificed material wealth to restore enormous raw mental focus and willpower.
ui.floor_1_node_10_desc: A hidden camp under stone roots. A dying scout hands you a secret chain journal.
ui.floor_1_node_10_optA_text: Vow to deliver the journal to the Spires (+15 Alignment, +20 EXP, +Old Scout Journal)
ui.floor_1_node_10_optA_journal: Vowed to complete the dying scout's chain bequest, starting a hidden questline.
ui.floor_1_node_10_optB_text: Take his remaining gold and let him rest (+40 Gold, -15 Alignment)
ui.floor_1_node_10_optB_journal: Looted the scout's purse, prioritizing coin values over morality.
ui.floor_1_node_11_desc: Dozens of tiny red-eyed rodents scurrying and forming an aggressive wall.
ui.floor_1_node_12_desc: An overgrown chest concealed under hanging moss vines.
ui.floor_1_node_12_optA_text: Slice vines carefully (-5 HP, +Iron Guard Ring)
ui.floor_1_node_12_optA_journal: Slashed thorn vines to reveal an Iron Guard Ring on Floor 1.
ui.floor_1_node_12_optB_text: Exchange void core connection code (-10 Aether, +30 Gold)
ui.floor_1_node_12_optB_journal: Exchanged shadow essence for direct coin trade.
ui.floor_1_node_13_desc: A quiet well glowing with restorative white energy.
ui.floor_1_node_13_optA_journal: Washed away dark corruption inside the Well of Purifying Solace.
ui.floor_1_node_13_optB_journal: Drank toxic residue to boost void pyre power at substantial physical damage.
ui.floor_1_node_14_desc: An optional giant amalgam of flesh and steel construct lumbering from a side passage! Extreme threat!
ui.floor_1_node_15_desc: A rogue scholar studying mutations offers a secret chain catalyst infusion.
ui.floor_1_node_15_optA_text: Inject the experimental catalyst (+15 Aether, +15 Aether, -10 HP)
ui.floor_1_node_15_optA_journal: Accepted experimental chemical injection, unlocking deep catalyst potential.
ui.floor_1_node_15_optB_journal: Safely bypassed suspicious experimental catalyst injections.
ui.floor_1_node_16_desc: An herbalism druid selling wild roots and healing salves.
ui.floor_1_node_16_optA_text: Buy Healing Elixir (-40 Gold, +Deep Cavern Herb Juice)
ui.floor_1_node_16_optA_journal: Bought herbal healing juice from wandering druid.
ui.floor_1_node_16_optB_journal: Sought coins by selling worthless seeds to druid.
ui.floor_1_node_17_desc: A long-toothed beast glowing with unstable blight fury attacks!
ui.floor_1_node_18_desc: A heavy stone monolith echoing with ancient earthquakes.
ui.floor_1_node_18_optA_text: Vibrate hand on totem (+50 EXP, -12 HP)
ui.floor_1_node_18_optA_journal: Touched vibrating earthen monolith, learning deep defensive techniques at minor health loss.
ui.floor_1_node_18_optB_text: Offer alignment pledge for willpower (+10 Will, -5 Alignment)
ui.floor_1_node_18_optB_journal: Sacrificed minor alignment rigidity to absorb stone willpower.
ui.floor_1_node_19_desc: Golgoth, the Plague Rat King, sits bloated upon a pile of garbage and rusted scepters. Complete all 20 sectors to secure ascension!

floor_100.title: The Sovereign Throne: The Eternal Duel
floor_100.description: You have reached the pinnacle of the Tower. The Eternal Blight has breached the final seals. Before you stands the Avatar of the Core. Your side demands the absolute sacrifice. An Eternal Duel must occur to resolve who governs the final seal.
floor_100.optA_text: Annihilate with Light & Seal the Core (Triumph Ending)
floor_100.optA_journal: You sealed the Core in blinding Light, achieving a glorious Triumph for the Sanctum.
floor_100.optB_text: Absorb the Void Core and Evolve (Hold Ending)
floor_100.optB_journal: You absorbed the Blight into your Void Covenant, holding the dark tide by sheer evolutionary dominance.
floor_100.optC_text: Shatter the Seals & Free the Outer World (Fracture Ending)
floor_100.optC_journal: You broke all seals, letting the outer world face its destiny, falling to a grand Spirit Fracture.

exarch_council.title: Exarch Grand Council (Floor %d)
exarch_council.description: An Exarch is crowned on this floor. High economic and militaristic strategies are debated here. Factions are declaring localized wars to capture the tower sectors. You must declare your stance.
exarch_council.optA_text: Fund the Celestial Fleet & Impose Order (+Aether, -Gold)
exarch_council.optA_journal: You funded the White Spires fleet on Floor %d to enforce strict Sanctum regulations.
exarch_council.optB_journal: You smuggled forbidden Void armaments on Floor %d to trigger a rebellion.
exarch_council.optC_text: Sell Intel to both sides for immense Mercenary profit (+Gold)
exarch_council.optC_journal: You played both sides on Floor %d as a shadow broker, amassing clean gold.

arbiter_threshold.title: Arbiter's Threshold Trial (Floor %d)
arbiter_threshold.description: An Arbiter stands in your path, testing your commitment with a trial of blade and spirit. The Blight is concentrated here. Will you force your way, or make a dark offering?
arbiter_threshold.optA_text: Invoke the Pure Aegis to smite the Arbiter (-20 HP)
arbiter_threshold.optA_journal: You battled through the Floor %d Arbiter trial with pure Celestial shield.
arbiter_threshold.optB_text: Offer a piece of your Soul to bypass the ward (-10 HP, Cruel)
arbiter_threshold.optB_journal: You fed the Void Covenant's flame on Floor %d by sacrificing raw life force.
arbiter_threshold.optC_text: Pay heavy bribery gold to buy safe safe-passage (-150 Gold)
arbiter_threshold.optC_journal: You bribed the Arbiter guides on Floor %d to bypass conflict.

theme_0.title: The Blighted Vaults - F%d
theme_0.description: Thick purple roots of the Eternal Blight wrap around crumbling stone chests. Skeletons dressed in silver armor lie frozen in prayer.
theme_0.optA_text: Purify the bones and lay them to rest (+Aether)
theme_0.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you consecrated fallen soldiers of the Sanctum.
theme_0.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you harvested corrupted Blight nodes to fuel Void rituals.
theme_0.optC_text: Loot the gold coins from the frozen coffers (+Gold)
theme_0.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you prioritized material gold over spiritual matters.

theme_1.title: The Shimmering Mirror - F%d
theme_1.description: A pool of heavy liquid starlight reflects your true Momentum. It whispers your secret class potential and beckons your soul to commit.
theme_1.optA_text: Kneel and pledge to the White Spires (+Aether, -10 HP)
theme_1.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you knelt before the White Spires mirror pool.
theme_1.optB_text: Shatter the mirror to absorb the cosmic shadow (+Aether, -10 HP)
theme_1.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you shattered the reflective pool, drawing power from its shards.
theme_1.optC_text: Drink from it to restore physical vitality (+20 HP)
theme_1.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you drank the mystical waters to heal your broken shell.

theme_2.title: The Ruined Shrine of Sealing - F%d
theme_2.description: A broken altar still floats in mid-air, casting flickering golden protection spells. It is slowly collapsing under the pressure of the Blight shadows.
theme_2.optA_text: Sacrifice blood to rejuvenate the ward (-15 HP, +Aether)
theme_2.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you sacrificed blood to keep the ancient seals alive.
theme_2.optB_text: Infect the altar with Void-essence to extract Pyre (+Aether)
theme_2.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you desecrated the sealing altar to fuel your dark covenants.
theme_2.optC_text: Scavenge gold-infused runes from the pillars (+Gold)
theme_2.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you pried rare runes from the ancient walls.

theme_3.title: The Spires Caravan - F%d
theme_3.description: Neutral nomadic traders traveling along the safe sectors are selling artifacts. They whisper of a fierce skirmish nearby and are willing to barter or trade info.
theme_3.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you purchased a holy relic from the wandering caravan.
theme_3.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you acquired a forbidden codex of Void spells.
theme_3.optC_text: Sell your old equipment for safety items (+Gold, +10 HP)
theme_3.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you traded equipment with merchants and patched up.

theme_4.title: The Weeping Void Outpost - F%d
theme_4.description: A vanguard outpost of the Void Covenant is in disarray. Dying scouts are muttering about the White Spires purifying squads hunting them down.
theme_4.optA_text: Deliver peaceful mercy-kills to scouts (+Aether, Spirit Momentum)
theme_4.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you offered mercy to the dying Void outcasts.
theme_4.optB_text: Harvest their life embers to resurrect them as void thralls (+Aether)
theme_4.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you animated the dead scouts into mindless thralls of the Covenant.
theme_4.optC_text: Search their bags for forgotten supply bags (+Gold)
theme_4.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you scavenged abandoned supplies from the warzone.

theme_5.title: The Whispering Fount - F%d
theme_5.description: A natural steam geyser filled with hot mineral water is shimmering. The air smells of sulphur, and whispers of the ancient Sovereign echoes in the mist.
theme_5.optA_text: Perform an Order cleansing ritual (+Aether, -10 HP)
theme_5.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you sanctied the mineral hotspring.
theme_5.optB_text: Infuse it with Blight blood to unlock power (+Aether, -10 HP)
theme_5.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you tainted the fount to summon chaotic whispers.
theme_5.optC_text: Bathe in the hot mineral waters to restore vitality (+30 HP, -20 Gold)
theme_5.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you rested in the mineral fount, restoring major strength.

theme_6.title: The Iron Threshold - F%d
theme_6.description: Heavy blast doors block the tunnel. Inscriptions demand a tribute of Momentum or pure gold to open.
theme_6.optA_text: Force the iron doors using pure faith (+Aether, -15 HP)
theme_6.optA_journal: On Floor %d, you forced the Iron Threshold with Holy zeal.
theme_6.optB_text: Sunder the locks using Void lightning (+Aether, -15 HP)
theme_6.optB_journal: On Floor %d, you tore the blast doors down with Void lightning.
theme_6.optC_text: Pay the automated tribute mechanism (-50 Gold)
theme_6.optC_journal: On Floor %d, you bypassed the gatekeeper's tax using gold.
